---
title: "GP_PaymentGraps_SQL"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

```

```{R load_imd}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)

# First, create a list of relevant metrics to check
relevant_metrics <- c("Average Number of Registered Patients", 
                      "Number of Registered Patients (Last Known Figure)", 
                      "Average number of registered patients1")

# Filter the dataset to only check values for the relevant metrics
filtered_for_metrics <- finance_datasets %>%
  filter(Metric %in% relevant_metrics) %>%
  group_by(YEAR, Practice_Code) %>%
  filter(any(Metric_Value < 1000)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now, exclude those practice codes (based on the YEAR and Practice_Code) that have any value < 1000
finance_datasets <- finance_datasets %>%
  anti_join(filtered_for_metrics, by = c("YEAR", "Practice_Code"))

finance_imd_wide <- finance_datasets %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Metric, 
    values_from = Metric_Value
  )

# Define the columns to rename
columns <- list(
  PRACTICE_CODE = "Practice_Code",
  WEIGHTED_PATIENTS = c("Average Number of Weighted Patients", 
                        "Number of Weighted Patients (Last Known Figure)",
                        "Average number of weighted patients1"),
  REGISTERED_PATIENTS = c("Average Number of Registered Patients", 
                          "Number of Registered Patients (Last Known Figure)",
                          "Average number of registered patients1"),
  PAYMENTS = "Total NHS Payments to General Practice",
  PAYMENTS_MINUS_DEDUCTIONS = c("Total NHS Payments to General Practice Minus Deductions",
                                "Total NHS Payments to General Practice Minus Deductions2")
)

# Rename columns in the dataframe
finance_imd_wide_renamed <- finance_imd_wide %>%
  rename( PRACTICE_CODE = "Practice_Code")%>%
  mutate(
    WEIGHTED_PATIENTS = rowSums(select(., all_of(columns$WEIGHTED_PATIENTS)), na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED_PATIENTS = rowSums(select(., all_of(columns$REGISTERED_PATIENTS)), na.rm = TRUE),
    PAYMENTS = select(., columns$PAYMENTS) %>% unlist(),
    PAYMENTS_MINUS_DEDUCTIONS = rowSums(select(., all_of(columns$PAYMENTS_MINUS_DEDUCTIONS)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(-all_of(columns$WEIGHTED_PATIENTS), # Remove old columns after combining
         -all_of(columns$REGISTERED_PATIENTS),
         -all_of(columns$PAYMENTS_MINUS_DEDUCTIONS)) # Remove old payment columns

# View the renamed dataframe
#print(finance_datasets_renamed)

finance_imd_weighted <- finance_imd_wide_renamed %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%
    group_by(IMD_QUINTILE, YEAR) %>%
  summarise(
    TOTAL_PAYMENTS = sum(PAYMENTS_MINUS_DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    TOTAL_WEIGHTED = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    NUM_PRACTICES = n_distinct(PRACTICE_CODE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(PAYMENT_PER_WEIGHTED_PATIENT = TOTAL_PAYMENTS / TOTAL_WEIGHTED) %>%
    na.omit()

finance_imd_registered <- finance_imd_wide_renamed %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%
    group_by(IMD_QUINTILE, YEAR) %>%
  summarise(
    TOTAL_PAYMENTS = sum(PAYMENTS_MINUS_DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    TOTAL_REGISTERED = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    NUM_PRACTICES = n_distinct(PRACTICE_CODE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(PAYMENT_PER_REGISTERED_PATIENT = TOTAL_PAYMENTS / TOTAL_REGISTERED) %>%
    na.omit()

grouped_sum <- finance_imd_weighted %>%
  group_by(YEAR) %>%
  summarise(
    TOTAL_PAYMENTS = sum(TOTAL_PAYMENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

library(ggplot2)

Weighted_By_Year <- ggplot(finance_imd_weighted, aes(
  x = YEAR,
  y = PAYMENT_PER_WEIGHTED_PATIENT,
  color = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE),
  group = IMD_QUINTILE
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "IMD Quintile") +
  #scale_x_continuous(
  #  breaks = sort(unique(finance_imd_weighted$YEAR)),  
  #  labels = sort(unique(finance_imd_weighted$YEAR))
 # ) +
  labs(
    title = "Payments per Weighted Patient by IMD Quintile",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Payment per Weighted Patient (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

registered_by_year <- ggplot(finance_imd_registered, aes(
  x = YEAR,
  y = PAYMENT_PER_REGISTERED_PATIENT,
  color = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE),
  group = IMD_QUINTILE
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "IMD Quintile") +
  #scale_x_continuous(
  #  breaks = sort(unique(finance_imd_registered$YEAR)),  
  #  labels = sort(unique(finance_imd_registered$YEAR))
 # ) +
  labs(
    title = "Payments per Weighted Patient by IMD Quintile",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Payment per Weighted Patient (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


finances_df_barchart <- finance_datasets %>%
  filter(YEAR == "2023")%>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Metric, 
    values_from = Metric_Value
  ) 

columns_barplot <- list(
    PRACTICE_CODE = "Practice_Code",
    CONTRACT_TYPE = "Contract_Type",
    WEIGHTED_PATIENTS = "Average Number of Weighted Patients", 
    REGISTERED_PATIENTS = "Average Number of Registered Patients",
    PAYMENTS_MINUS_DEDUCTIONS = "Total NHS Payments to General Practice Minus Deductions",
    PAYMENTS = "Total NHS Payments to General Practice",
    TOTAL_COVID_PAYMENTS = "Total NHS Payments to General Practice including covid vaccination, covid support and long covid payments",
    PRESCRIBING_FEE = "Prescribing Fee Payments",
    DISPENSING_FEE = "Dispensing Fee Payments",
    REINBURSMENT_FEE = "Reimbursement of Drugs",
    OTHER_PAYMENTS = "Other Payments",
    GLOBAL_SUM = "Global Sum",
    MPIG = "MPIG Correction factor",
    IT = "Information Management and Technology",
    PMS_BALANCE = "Balance of PMS Expenditure",
    QOF_PAYMENT = "Total QOF Payments",
    CHILD_VACCINE = "Childhood Vaccination and Immunisation Scheme",
    FLU_VACCINE = "Influenza and Pneumococcal Immunisations",
    ROTAVIRUS_VACCINE = "Rotavirus and Shingles Immunisation",
    PREMISES_PAYMENT = "Premises Payments",
    COVID_IMMUN = "Covid Immunisation",
    COVID_SUPPORT = "Covid Support and Expansion",
    LONG_COVID = "Long Covid",
    GP_EXTENDED = "GP Extended Hours Access",
    LD = "Learning Disabilities",
    MS = "Minor Surgery",
    SFVP = "Services for Violent Patients",
    NDES = "Non DES Item Pneumococcal Vaccine, Childhood Immunisation Main Programme",
    OOAIHUC = "Out Of Area in Hours Urgent Care",
    MENINGITIS = "Meningitis",
    PERTUSSIS = "Pertussis",
    LIS = "Local Incentive Schemes",
    WMS = "Weight Management Service",
    MAR = "Medical Assessment Reviews",
    SENIORITY = "Seniority",
    DRSP = "Doctors Retainer Scheme Payments",
    TLA = "Total Locum Allowances",
    PCO = "PCO Admin Other",
    GPT = "General Practice Transformation",
    WAF = "winter Access Fund",
    PSL = "Prolonged Study Leave",
    AACIRL = "Appraisal - Appraiser Costs in Respect of Locums",
    PCNP = "PCN Participation",
    DEDUCTIONS = "Deductions for Pensions, Levies and Prescription Charge Income"
)

finances_df_barchart <- finances_df_barchart %>%
  rename(!!!columns_barplot)

globalSum <- c("GLOBAL_SUM", "MPIG", "PMS_BALANCE")

ITPremises <- c("PREMISES_PAYMENT", "IT")

OtherAndPCOAdmin <- c(
  "SENIORITY", "DRSP", "TLA", "PCO", "OTHER_PAYMENTS", "PSL", "AACIRL"
)

PCNParticipation <- c("PCNP")

QOF <- c("QOF_PAYMENT")

DirectedEnhancedServices <- c(
  "CHILD_VACCINE", "FLU_VACCINE", "LD",
  "MS", "ROTAVIRUS_VACCINE", "SFVP", "OOAIHUC", "MENINGITIS", "PERTUSSIS", "WMS", "MAR"
)

LocalIncentiveSchemes <- c(
  "LIS"
)

AccessAndTransFormation <- c("GPT", "WAF", "GP_EXTENDED")

#remove from quintiles
COVID <- c("COVID_IMMUN", "COVID_SUPPORT", "LONG_COVID")

PrescribingFee <- c("PRESCRIBING_FEE")

Dispensing <- c("DISPENSING_FEE")

DrugReinbursement <- c("REINBURSMENT_FEE")

Deductions <- c("DEDUCTIONS")

#ensure covid columns are numeric
finances_df_barchart <- finances_df_barchart %>%
  mutate(across(any_of(LocalIncentiveSchemes), as.numeric))

#calculate grouped totals 
finances_GROUPED_TOTAL <- finances_df_barchart %>%
  mutate(
    Total.Global.Sum          = rowSums(across(all_of(globalSum)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Total.COVID          = rowSums(across(all_of(COVID)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Total.IT.Premises         = rowSums(across(all_of(ITPremises)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin   = rowSums(across(all_of(OtherAndPCOAdmin)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Total.DirectedEnhancedServices = rowSums(across(all_of(DirectedEnhancedServices)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Total.AccessAndTransFormation = rowSums(across(all_of(AccessAndTransFormation)), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

#join IMD onto and then group by year and imd, add the avg registered and weighted columns for each group as well 
finances_IMD_TOTAL <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%
  group_by(IMD_QUINTILE, YEAR) %>%
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION          = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
 # mutate(Deductions = abs(Deductions)) %>%  # Convert Deductions to positive
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services, Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement, QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))

#pivot long
finances_IMD_TOTAL <- finances_IMD_TOTAL %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(IMD_QUINTILE, YEAR),
    names_to = "Payment Category",
    values_to = "Total (£)"
  )


#create a uniform payment category column
finances_IMD_TOTAL <- finances_IMD_TOTAL %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = str_trim(
      str_remove(`Payment Category`,
                 regex("\\((Registered|Weighted|ADJ)\\)$", ignore_case = TRUE))
    )
  )

#order levels for barplots
ordered_levels_avg <- rev(c(
  "Global_Sum Avg",
  "IT_Premises Avg",
  "QOF Avg",
  "Local_Incentive_Schemes Avg",
  "Directed_Enhanced_Services Avg",
  "ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION Avg",
  "PCNPARTICIPATION Avg",
 # "COVID_19 Avg",
  "Other_And_PCOAdmin Avg",
  "Prescribing Avg",
  "Dispensing Avg",
  "DrugReinbursement Avg",
  "Deductions Avg"
))

ordered_levels_sum <- rev(c(
   "Global_Sum",
  "IT_Premises",
  "QOF",
  "Local_Incentive_Schemes",
  "Directed_Enhanced_Services",
  "ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION",
  "PCNPARTICIPATION",
 # "COVID_19 Avg",
  "Other_And_PCOAdmin",
  "Prescribing",
  "Dispensing",
  "DrugReinbursement",
  "Deductions"
))

Total_Finance_Categories <- finances_IMD_TOTAL %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_sum)
  )

Avg_Finance_Categories <- finances_IMD_TOTAL %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_avg)
  )

Weighted_By_Year <- ggplot(finance_imd_weighted, aes(
  x = YEAR,
  y = PAYMENT_PER_WEIGHTED_PATIENT,
  color = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE),
  group = IMD_QUINTILE
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "IMD Quintile") +
 # scale_x_continuous(
 #   breaks = sort(unique(finance_imd_weighted$YEAR)),  
 #   labels = sort(unique(finance_imd_weighted$YEAR))
 # ) +
  labs(
    title = "Payments per Weighted Patient by IMD Quintile",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Payment per Weighted Patient (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

Registered_By_Year <- ggplot(finance_imd_registered, aes(
  x = YEAR,
  y = PAYMENT_PER_REGISTERED_PATIENT,
  color = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE),
  group = IMD_QUINTILE
)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "IMD Quintile") +
  #scale_x_continuous(
  #  breaks = sort(unique(finance_imd_registered$YEAR)),  
  #  labels = sort(unique(finance_imd_registered$YEAR))
  #) +
  labs(
    title = "Payments per Registered Patient by IMD Quintile",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Payment per Registered Patient (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


Total_Finance_Categories <- Total_Finance_Categories %>%
  filter(
    YEAR == 2023,
    !is.na(IMD_QUINTILE),
    !grepl("\\(Registered\\)|\\(Weighted\\)|\\(ADJ\\)", `Payment Category`, ignore.case = TRUE),
    !grepl("REGISTERED|WEIGHTED|adj_population|Total Population", `Payment Category`, ignore.case = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(`Payment Category`) %>%
  mutate(total_cat = sum(`Total (£)`, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_sum)) %>%
  group_by(IMD_QUINTILE) %>%
  mutate(
    group_total = sum(`Total (£)`),
    pct = `Total (£)` / group_total,
    label_text = paste0(
  scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),
  " (",
  scales::label_number(
    accuracy = 0.1,          
    scale = 1e-6,            
    suffix = "m"
  )(`Total (£)`),
  ")"
)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

Barchart_Total_Payments_By_Categories <- ggplot(Total_Finance_Categories, aes(
  x = `Total (£)`,
  y = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE),
  fill =  PayCat_base
)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
   aes(label = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),  # Percentage (50%)
      "\n(", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"  # Raw number in brackets
    )),
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
 # scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma)+
  labs(
    title = "Total NHS Payments by IMD Quintile (2023)",
    x = "IMD Quintile (1 = Most Deprived, 5 = Least Deprived)",
    y = "Total Payments (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories <- Avg_Finance_Categories %>%
  filter(
    YEAR == 2023,
    grepl("\\(Registered\\)$", `Payment Category`),  
    !is.na(IMD_QUINTILE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_avg)) %>%
  group_by(IMD_QUINTILE) %>%
  mutate(
    group_total = sum(`Total (£)`),
    pct = `Total (£)` / group_total,
    label_text = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1), 
      " (", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories <- ggplot(Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories, aes(
  x = `Total (£)`,
  y = IMD_QUINTILE,
  fill =  PayCat_base
)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
   aes(label = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),  # Percentage (50%)
      "\n(", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"  # Raw number in brackets
    )),
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average NHS Payments per Registered Patient by IMD Quintile (2023)",
    x = "IMD Quintile (1 = Most Deprived, 5 = Least Deprived)",
    y = "Average Payment per Registered Patient (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

Weighted_Patients_Finance_Categories <- Avg_Finance_Categories %>%
  filter(
    YEAR == 2023,
    grepl("\\(Weighted\\)$", `Payment Category`),
    !is.na(IMD_QUINTILE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_avg)) %>%
  group_by(IMD_QUINTILE) %>%
  mutate(
    group_total = sum(`Total (£)`),
    pct = `Total (£)` / group_total,
    label_text = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1), 
      " (", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

Barchart_Weighted_Patients_By_Categories <- ggplot(
  Weighted_Patients_Finance_Categories,
  aes(
    x = `Total (£)`,
    y = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE),
    fill = PayCat_base
  )
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
   aes(label = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),  # Percentage (50%)
      "\n(", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"  # Raw number in brackets
    )),
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average NHS Payments per Weighted Patient by IMD Quintile (2023)",
    x = "IMD Quintile (1 = Most Deprived, 5 = Least Deprived)",
    y = "Average Payment per Weighted Patient (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )


#For ease to print into a PDF cleanly
# Create a list of all plots
plot_list <- list(
  Weighted_By_Year,
  Registered_By_Year,
 # Adj_By_Year,
  Barchart_Total_Payments_By_Categories,
  Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories,
  Barchart_Weighted_Patients_By_Categories
  #Barchart_Adj_Patients_By_Categories
)


# Export all plots to a single PDF
pdf("All_NHS_IMD_Plots_Combined.pdf", width = 10, height = 6)

for (p in plot_list) {
  print(p)
}

dev.off()

message("Saved PDF")




#join IMD onto and then group by year and imd, add the avg registered and weighted columns for each group as well 
finances_IMD_Over65 <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(Over65_quintile, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Over65_quintile)) %>%
  mutate(Over65_quintile = as.factor(Over65_quintile)) %>%
  group_by(Over65_quintile, YEAR) %>%
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing         = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement         = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions                 = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services, Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement,  QOF, Deductions),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))

#pivot long
finances_IMD_Over65 <- finances_IMD_Over65 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(Over65_quintile, YEAR),
    names_to = "Payment Category",
    values_to = "Total (£)"
  )


#create a uniform payment category column
finances_IMD_Over65 <- finances_IMD_Over65 %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = str_trim(
      str_remove(`Payment Category`,
                 regex("\\((Registered|Weighted|ADJ)\\)$", ignore_case = TRUE))
    )
  )

Total_Finance_Categories_over65 <- finances_IMD_Over65 %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_sum)
  )

Avg_Finance_Categories_over65 <- finances_IMD_Over65 %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_avg)
  )

Total_Finance_Categories_over65 <- Total_Finance_Categories_over65 %>%
  filter(
    YEAR == 2023,
    !is.na(Over65_quintile),
    !grepl("\\(Registered\\)|\\(Weighted\\)|\\(ADJ\\)", `Payment Category`, ignore.case = TRUE),
    !grepl("REGISTERED|WEIGHTED|adj_population|Total Population", `Payment Category`, ignore.case = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(`Payment Category`) %>%
  mutate(total_cat = sum(`Total (£)`, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_sum)) %>%
  group_by(Over65_quintile) %>%
  mutate(
    group_total = sum(`Total (£)`),
    pct = `Total (£)` / group_total,
    label_text = paste0(
  scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),
  " (",
  scales::label_number(
    accuracy = 0.1,          
    scale = 1e-6,            
    suffix = "m"
  )(`Total (£)`),
  ")"
)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

Barchart_Total_Payments_By_Categories_over65 <- ggplot(Total_Finance_Categories_over65, aes(
  x = `Total (£)`,
  y = as.factor(Over65_quintile),
  fill =  PayCat_base
)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
   aes(label = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),  # Percentage (50%)
      "\n(", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"  # Raw number in brackets
    )),
    size = 2.5,
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  #scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma)+
  labs(
    title = "Total NHS Payments by Over 65 Quintile (2023)",
    x = "IMD Quintile (1 = Most Deprived, 5 = Least Deprived)",
    y = "Total Payments (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories_Over65 <- Avg_Finance_Categories_over65 %>%
  filter(
    YEAR == 2023,
    grepl("\\(Registered\\)$", `Payment Category`),  
    !is.na(Over65_quintile)
  ) %>%
  mutate(PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_avg)) %>%
  group_by(Over65_quintile) %>%
  mutate(
    group_total = sum(`Total (£)`),
    pct = `Total (£)` / group_total,
    label_text = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1), 
      " (", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories_over65 <- ggplot(Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories_Over65, aes(
  x = `Total (£)`,
  y = Over65_quintile,
  fill =  PayCat_base
)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
   aes(label = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),  # Percentage (50%)
      "\n(", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"  # Raw number in brackets
    )),
    size = 2.5,
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average NHS Payments per Registered Patient by Over 65 Quintile (2023)",
    x = "% Over 65 Quintile (1 = Least over 65, 5 = Most over 65)",
    y = "Average Payment per Registered Patient (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

Weighted_Patients_Finance_Categories_over65 <- Avg_Finance_Categories_over65 %>%
  filter(
    YEAR == 2023,
    grepl("\\(Weighted\\)$", `Payment Category`),
    !is.na(Over65_quintile)
  ) %>%
  mutate(PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ordered_levels_avg)) %>%
  group_by(Over65_quintile) %>%
  mutate(
    group_total = sum(`Total (£)`),
    pct = `Total (£)` / group_total,
    label_text = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1), 
      " (", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

Barchart_Weighted_Patients_By_Categories_Over65 <- ggplot(
  Weighted_Patients_Finance_Categories_over65,
  aes(
    x = `Total (£)`,
    y = as.factor(Over65_quintile),
    fill = PayCat_base
  )
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
 aes(label = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),  # Percentage (50%)
      "\n(", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 0.1), ")"  # Raw number in brackets
    )),
    size = 2.5,
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average NHS Payments per Weighted Patient by Over 65 Quintile (2023)",
    x = "% Over 65 Quintile (1 = Least over 65, 5 = Most over 65)",
    y = "Average Payment per Weighted Patient (£)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )


#print in Markdown
print(Weighted_By_Year)
print(Registered_By_Year)
print(Barchart_Total_Payments_By_Categories)
print(Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories)
print(Barchart_Weighted_Patients_By_Categories)
print(Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories_over65)
print(Barchart_Total_Payments_By_Categories_over65)
print(Barchart_Weighted_Patients_By_Categories_Over65)



#join IMD onto and then group by year and imd, add the avg registered and weighted columns for each group as well 
finances_TOTAL <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%
  group_by(YEAR) %>%
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    COVID_19         = sum(Total.COVID, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION          = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services, Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement, QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION, COVID_19),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))

#pivot long
finances_TOTAL <- finances_TOTAL %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(YEAR),
    names_to = "Payment Category",
    values_to = "Total (£)"
  )


#create a uniform payment category column
finances_TOTAL <- finances_TOTAL %>%
  mutate(
    PayCat_base = str_trim(
      str_remove(`Payment Category`,
                 regex("\\((Registered|Weighted|ADJ)\\)$", ignore_case = TRUE))
    )
  )%>%
  filter(PayCat_base != "Deductions Avg")  # Exclude rows where PayCat_base is "Deductions"

ALL_ordered_levels_avg <- rev(c(
  "Global_Sum Avg",
  "IT_Premises Avg",
  "QOF Avg",
  "Local_Incentive_Schemes Avg",
  "Directed_Enhanced_Services Avg",
  "ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION Avg",
  "PCNPARTICIPATION Avg",
  "COVID_19 Avg",
  "Other_And_PCOAdmin Avg",
  "Prescribing Avg",
  "Dispensing Avg",
  "DrugReinbursement Avg"
  # "Deductions Avg",
))


ALL_Avg_Finance_Categories <- finances_TOTAL %>%
  mutate(
    # Set factor levels for PayCat_base upfront
    PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ALL_ordered_levels_avg)
  )

# Apply the factor ordering and filtering in one go
Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories_ALL <- ALL_Avg_Finance_Categories %>%
  filter(
    YEAR == 2023,
    grepl("\\(Registered\\)$", `Payment Category`)  # Filter Registered categories
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Apply the factor order again after filtering (important for consistency)
    PayCat_base = factor(PayCat_base, levels = ALL_ordered_levels_avg),
    group_total = sum(`Total (£)`),  # Sum total by group
    pct = `Total (£)` / group_total,  # Calculate percentage
    label_text = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),  # Display pct
      " (", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 1), ")"  # Display raw total
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()  # Ensure ungrouped after mutate

Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories_ALL <- ggplot(
  Registered_Patients_Finance_Categories_ALL, 
  aes(
    x = pct,  # Empty x-axis for a single bar (no categorical grouping on x)
    y = "",  # Use pct to define the height of each segment in the stacked bar
    fill = PayCat_base  # Different colors for each category (PayCat_base)
  )
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, position = "stack") +  # Stack the categories
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(
      scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1),  # Percentage label (50%)
      "\n(", scales::comma(`Total (£)`, accuracy = 1), ")"  # Raw number in brackets
    )),
    size = 3,  # Adjust text size as needed
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),  # Center the text vertically within each stack
    hjust = 0.5  # Center the text horizontally
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average NHS Payments per Registered Patient (2023)",
    x = "Percentage of Total Payments (%)",  # Label for x-axis
    y = NULL  # No y-axis label
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),  # Remove y-axis text
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),  # Remove y-axis title
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),  # Bold x-axis text (even if empty)
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

print(Barchart_Registered_Patients_By_Categories_ALL)

#variation across practices 

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# First, let's summarize the finances data
finances_Practice <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%      # Join with IMD data
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE), YEAR == 2023) %>%                 # Filter for YEAR = 2023 and non-missing IMD_QUINTILE
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%              # Ensure IMD_QUINTILE is a factor
  group_by(YEAR, PRACTICE_CODE) %>%                               # Group by YEAR and PRACTICE_CODE
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION    = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Compute averages based on REGISTERED and WEIGHTED
    `Avg (Registered)` = (Global_Sum + IT_Premises + Other_And_PCOAdmin + Directed_Enhanced_Services + 
                          ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION + Local_Incentive_Schemes + Prescribing + Dispensing + 
                          DrugReinbursement + QOF + PCNPARTICIPATION) / REGISTERED,
    
    `Avg (Weighted)`   = (Global_Sum + IT_Premises + Other_And_PCOAdmin + Directed_Enhanced_Services + 
                          ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION + Local_Incentive_Schemes + Prescribing + Dispensing + 
                          DrugReinbursement + QOF + PCNPARTICIPATION) / WEIGHTED
  )

# Now, create the bins for Avg (Registered) and Avg (Weighted)
finances_Practice_binned <- finances_Practice %>%
  mutate(
    `Registered Group` = cut(`Avg (Registered)`, breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 10), right = FALSE, include.lowest = TRUE, 
                           labels = paste(seq(0, 490, by = 10), seq(9, 499, by = 10), sep = "-")),
    `Weighted Group` = cut(`Avg (Weighted)`, breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 10), right = FALSE, include.lowest = TRUE, 
                         labels = paste(seq(0, 490, by = 10), seq(9, 499, by = 10), sep = "-"))
  )

# Reshape data to long format for easier plotting
finances_Practice_binned_long <- finances_Practice_binned %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(`Registered Group`, `Weighted Group`), 
               names_to = "Metric", 
               values_to = "Bin")

# Now, let's create the side-by-side histogram using ggplot2
paymentVariation <- ggplot(finances_Practice_binned_long) +
  geom_bar(aes(x = Bin, fill = Metric), position = "dodge", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Registered Group" = "blue", "Weighted Group" = "red")) +
  labs(x = "Practices by average Registered and Weighted payments per capita Grouped into £10 Intervals", 
       y = "Count of Practices", 
       title = "Variation in payments per capita across practices") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_blank())

print(paymentVariation)


# First, let's summarize the finances data
finances_Practice <- finances_GROUPED_TOTAL %>%
  left_join(prac_imd, by = c("YEAR", "PRACTICE_CODE")) %>%      # Join with IMD data
  filter(!is.na(IMD_QUINTILE), YEAR == 2023) %>%                 # Filter for YEAR = 2023 and non-missing IMD_QUINTILE
  mutate(IMD_QUINTILE = as.factor(IMD_QUINTILE)) %>%              # Ensure IMD_QUINTILE is a factor
  group_by(YEAR, Dispensing_Practice) %>%                               # Group by YEAR and PRACTICE_CODE
  summarise(
    Global_Sum          = sum(Total.Global.Sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    IT_Premises         = sum(Total.IT.Premises, na.rm = TRUE),
    Other_And_PCOAdmin  = sum(Total.OtherAndPCOAdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    Directed_Enhanced_Services = sum(Total.DirectedEnhancedServices, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION = sum(Total.AccessAndTransFormation, na.rm = TRUE),
    Local_Incentive_Schemes = sum(LIS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prescribing         = sum(PRESCRIBING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Dispensing          = sum(DISPENSING_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    Deductions          = sum(DEDUCTIONS, na.rm = TRUE),
    DrugReinbursement   = sum(REINBURSMENT_FEE, na.rm = TRUE),
    QOF                 = sum(QOF_PAYMENT, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCNPARTICIPATION    = sum(PCNP, na.rm = TRUE),
    REGISTERED          = sum(REGISTERED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    WEIGHTED            = sum(WEIGHTED_PATIENTS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )%>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Global_Sum, IT_Premises, Other_And_PCOAdmin, Directed_Enhanced_Services, Local_Incentive_Schemes, Prescribing, Dispensing, DrugReinbursement, QOF, Deductions, PCNPARTICIPATION, ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION),
    list(
      "Avg (Registered)" = ~ . / REGISTERED,
      "Avg (Weighted)"   = ~ . / WEIGHTED
    ),
    .names = "{.col} {fn}"
  ))

# Define the custom order for categories
ALL_ordered_levels_avg <- rev(c(
  "Global_Sum",
  "IT_Premises",
  "QOF",
  "Local_Incentive_Schemes",
  "Directed_Enhanced_Services",
  "ACCESSANDTRANSFORMATION",
  "PCNPARTICIPATION",
  "Other_And_PCOAdmin",
  "Prescribing",
  "Dispensing",
  "DrugReinbursement",
  "Deductions"
))

# Prepare the data
barplot_data <- finances_Practice %>%
  select(
    Dispensing_Practice,
    ends_with("Avg (Registered)"),
    ends_with("Avg (Weighted)")
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Dispensing_Practice,
    names_to = c("Payment_Category", "Patient_Type"),
    names_pattern = "^(.*) Avg \\((Registered|Weighted)\\)$",
    values_to = "Avg_Payment"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(
      paste(Dispensing_Practice, Patient_Type, sep = " - "),
      levels = c(
         "Yes - Weighted",
        "No - Weighted",
        "Yes - Registered",
        "No - Registered"
      )
    )
  )

# Apply factor ordering separately to Payment_Category
barplot_data$Payment_Category <- factor(
  barplot_data$Payment_Category,
  levels = ALL_ordered_levels_avg
)

dispensingPlot <- ggplot(barplot_data,
       aes(y = Group,
           x = Avg_Payment,
           fill = Payment_Category)) +
  geom_col() +
  # Add the Avg_Payment data labels centered on each bar
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Avg_Payment, 0)), 
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),  # Position text in the center of the bar
            color = "black", size = 3) +  # White text for contrast
  labs(
    y = NULL,
    x = "Average Payment per Patient",
    fill = "Payment Category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() 

print(dispensingPlot)


```
